memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q6_k

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q6_k_ref

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const void *W, const float *X, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q6_k

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q6_k

briefdescription.para: GEMM/GEMV kernels with Q6_K quantized weights.

detaileddescription.para:
Implements matrix multiplication where:
Activations (input): FP32
Weights: Q6_K (6-bit k-quant, int8 scales)
Output: FP32

Q6_K Format (256 weights per block):
d: FP16 super-block scale
ql: 128 bytes (low 4 bits of each weight)
qh: 64 bytes (high 2 bits of each weight)
scales: 16 int8 sub-block scales
